heading: Membership
label: 22503 Membership
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2250336:97., ; , ; , ; , , .Feb. 24, 1925, ch. 303, § 743 Stat. 968Sept. 26, 1942, ch. 56356 Stat. 758June 26, 1953, ch. 15267 Stat. 81Pub. L. 93–26788 Stat. 85Apr. 12, 1974In clause (2), before subclause (A), the word “natural” is substituted for “of her blood” to eliminate unnecessary words. The words “or sons”, “or daughters”, “or stepsons”, and “or stepdaughters” are omitted as unnecessary.

children.text: who are citizens of the United States; and

children.label: A
children.text: served in the Armed Forces of the United States or its allies in World War I, World War II, the Korean conflict, or any subsequent war or conflict involving the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: was honorably discharged from that service or continues in the service.
